area_anchor: Brikette — Long email threads load slowly because every message is fetched at once
current_truth: The thread detail endpoint fetches all messages for a thread in a single query with no pagination. For threads with many back-and-forth messages, this loads unnecessary data and slows down the detail view.
next_scope_now: Add pagination to the thread detail API and lazy-load older messages in the UI, showing the most recent messages first.
adjacent_later: Virtual scrolling for very long threads
evidence_refs: operator-stated: detail view always fetches all messages, no pagination for long threads
why: When staff open a long email conversation, they have to wait for every single message in the thread to load before they can see the latest reply. Most of the time they only need the last few messages. Loading everything up front wastes time and makes the inbox feel sluggish on busy threads. Paginating messages means staff see the latest conversation immediately.

intended_outcome.statement: Thread detail loads the most recent messages first with a 'load more' option for older messages, reducing initial load time for long threads.
